nws_forecast.name: Tonight
nws_forecast.detailed: A slight chance of rain showers before 7pm, then rain. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 36. Northeast wind 8 to 12 mph, with gusts as high as 23 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.
